overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character navigating a neon-lit urban plaza at night. The character moves from an open plaza through a covered walkway with purple neon lights, then along a row of food stalls with Japanese lanterns, briefly sits at a counter, and continues through the futuristic city environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open futuristic plaza with palm trees and neon signage

events.description: character stands up from the bench and begins moving forward
character transitions from walking to running speed

agents.ego_description: gets up from a bench and runs through the open plaza toward the covered walkway

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the plaza walkway
large illuminated advertisement on distant futuristic building
concrete bench with integrated lighting where character was sitting
dark building with large white '02' signage and teal lighting
reflective wet concrete ground surface covering the open plaza

segments.scene_description: The character begins seated on a glowing bench in an open futuristic plaza at night. They stand up and start running through the space, passing palm trees and heading toward a covered walkway. The '02' building stands prominently to the right while neon billboards illuminate the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath building overpass with neon accents

events.description: enters the covered walkway with dark overhead structure
moves deeper into the darker section illuminated by purple neon pillars

agents.ego_description: runs through the dimly covered walkway beneath the building overpass

entered.detail: dark concrete overpass covering the walkway
vertical purple neon light strips mounted on building columns
simple concrete seating along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway beneath a massive building overpass. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with the sky mostly blocked overhead. Purple neon light pillars illuminate the right side of the path as the character continues running through this sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza corner transitioning to food vendor row

events.description: exits the covered walkway back into the open plaza area
character makes a sharp left turn toward the food stalls

agents.ego_description: exits the covered area and turns left toward the row of food vendors

notable_agents.action: walking across the plaza in the distance

entered.detail: line of small vendor stalls with illuminated signs and umbrellas
small wooden kiosk with metal security grating

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the character turns left into a more open plaza corner. The '02' building now appears on the left side as the character approaches a row of food stalls in the distance. A few pedestrians are visible walking through the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food stall walkway with Japanese lanterns

events.description: enters the narrow corridor of food stalls with hanging red lanterns
passing by various food vendors with steam and neon signs

agents.ego_description: walks steadily along the row of food stalls under the red paper lanterns

notable_agents.action: vendor working behind the food counter preparing meals

entered.detail: traditional Japanese-style red paper lanterns hanging above the stalls
open-air food preparation counters with glowing displays
various neon signs for different food vendors in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow walkway lined with food stalls on the left. Red paper lanterns hang overhead, creating an intimate, enclosed atmosphere. Various vendors are visible working behind their counters as the character walks past the row of stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate food counter with green neon lighting

events.description: character slows down and approaches the specific food counter
character sits down on a stool at the food stall counter
character stands up from the counter and exits the stall area

agents.ego_description: sits down at the green-lit food stall counter briefly, then gets up and continues

notable_agents.action: cook working behind the counter with steam rising from food

entered.detail: food stall illuminated by distinctive green neon lighting with menu displays
round stools positioned in front of the glowing white counter
steam rising from hot food on the cooking surface

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a specific food stall bathed in green neon light. They sit down on a stool at the counter where a vendor is working behind a steaming grill, then quickly get up and move toward the exit of the stall area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with stairs and distant food vendors

events.description: exits the food stall area back into the open plaza
passes a bright blue arcade machine with glowing screen

agents.ego_description: continues walking through the open plaza past the arcade machine toward distant stalls

notable_agents.action: walking ahead toward the distant food stalls

entered.detail: bright blue vending machine or arcade cabinet with 'BIG' text and colorful graphics
wide concrete staircase leading up to an upper level
food vendor stalls with yellow umbrellas in the distance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the food stall area, the character enters a more open plaza section. They pass a bright blue arcade machine on the right and a concrete staircase on the left. The character continues walking toward distant food stalls with illuminated umbrellas visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit futuristic plaza into a series of enclosed urban corridors and back into an open city square. It begins with the character rising from a glowing bench and running past palm trees and billboards toward a massive building overpass. As the character enters the sheltered walkway, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed, illuminated by purple neon pillars before opening up again into a plaza corner where the character turns toward a row of food stalls. The scene then shifts into a narrow, intimate walkway lined with red paper lanterns and vendors, leading to a brief stop at a green-lit counter with a steaming grill. Finally, the camera follows the character as they exit the stall area and move back into an open plaza, passing a bright blue arcade machine and concrete stairs toward distant illuminated umbrellas.
